name: office-meal-app
description: Office meal management — local-first build (in-memory, mock auth)

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @office-meal/shared && npm run build -w @office-meal/backend && npm run build -w @office-meal/web
scripts.preview:prod: npm run build && npm run start
